description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Docs that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: docs and fix-index. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest for the master branch, sets up Python 3.8, installs dependencies with poetry, and builds documentation with mkdocs. The fix-index job depends on docs, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the gh-pages branch, fixes the index.html file, commits changes, and pushes them to the gh-pages branch.
